## School Governance Checklist

- [ ] This change keeps Codex/OpenAI and Antigravity/Gemini as the only official school AI routes.
- [ ] This change does not add Ollama Cloud, uncensored local AI, or unknown agent providers as official classroom routes.
- [ ] This change does not add attack, theft, fraud, bypass, unsafe surveillance, or criminal automation workflows.
- [ ] Tests or smoke checks were run, or the reason they were not run is documented.
- [ ] Public docs remain bounded, educational, human-review-only, and source-safe.
